name: Record Room at Catherine Street
content: This is one of the alternative bar/venue spaces in Limerick. While at this venue, I have been to a dyke night, attended a gothic marxism meeting, and watched a grown man stick a lit firecracker up his arse at a punk show, all overseen by a shrine to the Virgin Mary built into one of the walls. There are plenty more less-unhinged events that happen here, but I have never been to any. I would recommend going sometime.
